impacts.description: Projected drawdown of 5-8 meters in local aquifers within 5km radius of the pit.
Increased particulate matter from haul roads and crushing operations, primarily during dry season.
mitigation_measures: Dust suppression systems at transfer points

impacts.description: Direct loss of 450 hectares of arid shrubland, affecting populations of vizcacha and several endemic plant species.
Relocation of 120 households from the direct project footprint. Potential impacts on informal water access for downstream communities.
Blasting and heavy vehicle operations expected to exceed baseline levels at nearest community (Pueblo Nuevo, 3km away).
mitigation_measures: Real-time noise monitoring with public dashboard

impacts.description: Generation of approximately 1.2 million tonnes per year of processed tailings requiring secure, long-term storage.
Introduction of large-scale industrial infrastructure into a mountainous landscape visible from a scenic highway.
mitigation_measures: Final landform design to blend with topography
